name: Aegis
description: NVIDIA Aegis content-safety classification benchmark (reported as F1-score).

name: AlpacaEval 2.0
description: Length-controlled win rate vs GPT-4-Preview, judged by GPT-4-turbo.

name: ARC-AGI
description: Abstract visual grid transformation tasks requiring general fluid reasoning.

name: Arena-Hard
description: Auto LLM-as-judge benchmark on 500 hard prompts vs GPT-4.

name: BBQ Bias Score
description: BBQ ambiguous-context bias score (Anthropic system-card metric, lower = less biased; reported in percentage points). Separate from BBQ accuracy.

name: BFCL v2
description: Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard V2 (Aug 2024) — adds live/enterprise function-calling, less contamination.

name: BFCL v3
description: Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard v3 — function-calling correctness.

name: BFCL v4
description: Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard v4 — function-calling / agentic tool-use correctness.

name: BigCodeBench Complete
description: 1140 code-completion tasks with complex library calls. Pass@1.

name: Chatbot Arena
description: ELO from anonymous human pairwise preference battles.

name: Coding Korean
description: Scale Labs Legacy 리더보드의 'Coding' 섹션 아래 위치한 Korean 평가 — 한국어 환경에서의 모델 응답을 사람 페어와이즈로 비교. 정확히 무엇을 측정하는지에 대한 공식 설명이 빈약합니다. (Scale에서 2025-03 deprecated, 과거 점수만 보존)

name: CRAG
description: Comprehensive RAG benchmark — retrieval-augmented factual QA.

name: Fortress
description: Scale SEAL frontier-risk safety eval. Score is risk rate — lower is safer.

name: FrontierCode
description: Cognition FrontierCode agentic coding eval (Diamond subset). Reported at medium/high effort.

name: Gray Swan Arena
description: Adversarial safety evaluation with LLM/human judging.

name: GroundUI-1K
description: GUI element grounding — predict the 2D location of a described UI element.

name: Humanity's Last Exam
description: 2500+ expert-level questions across 100+ disciplines. Near-zero scores for most models at launch.

name: HLE-Verified
description: Verified/revised Humanity's Last Exam with component-wise verification. https://huggingface.co/datasets/skylenage/HLE-Verified

name: HLE w/ tool
description: Humanity's Last Exam with tool use (search agent).

name: IFEval
description: Instruction-following evaluation — verifiable constraints (e.g. word count, format).

name: Jigsaw
description: Jigsaw toxicity classification benchmark (reported as F1-score).

name: LiveBench
description: Contamination-resistant monthly-refresh benchmark. Verifiable answers across Reasoning/Math/Coding/Language/IF.

name: LiveCodeBench
description: Contamination-free coding benchmark from live competitive programming contests.

name: LVBench
description: Long-video understanding QA over YouTube videos.

name: MATH-P-Hard
description: MATH level-5 문제에 문제 본질을 바꾸는 hard perturbation 적용. 단순 암기 vs 일반화된 추론을 가르는 강한 평가 — frontier 모델도 10-25%p 하락 (arxiv 2502.06453, ICML 2025).

name: MATH-P-Simple
description: MATH level-5 문제에 의미를 보존하는 가벼운 변형(simple perturbation) 적용. 표준 MATH와 비교용 통제 조건.

name: MAXIFE
description: Multilingual instruction-following; English + multilingual original prompts (23 settings).

name: MCP Atlas
description: Tool-use benchmark over MCP server tasks. Lab tech-reports commonly include it.

name: MM-Mind2Web
description: Multimodal web agent benchmark; per-step action accuracy on Mind2Web.

name: MMLU-ProX
description: Multilingual MMLU-Pro; averaged accuracy over 29 languages.

name: MultiChallenge
description: Scale SEAL multi-turn instruction-following eval, LLM-judge.

name: MultiNRC
description: Scale SEAL Multilingual Non-English Reasoning Challenge. LLM-judge.

name: ODInW13
description: Object detection in the wild (13 datasets).

name: PropensityBench
description: Scale SEAL eval of model propensity for harmful agentic behaviors. Lower is safer.

name: SciCode
description: Scientific code-generation benchmark drawn from real research problems.

name: SimpleQA Hallucination Rate
description: SimpleQA hallucination / incorrect-attempt rate (lower = better). Separate column from SimpleQA accuracy.

name: SWE-Bench Verified
description: 전체 SWE-bench(2,294문제)에서 사람이 검증한 500문제 부분집합. 실제 GitHub 이슈를 자동 테스트 스위트로 패치 정답 여부를 채점. ※ 전체 SWE-bench와는 다른 벤치마크(부분집합)임.
note: OpenAI는 2026-02 SWE-bench Verified 점수 보고를 중단했습니다. 이유: (1) 테스트 케이스 결함 — 감사한 어려운 문제의 59.4%가 기능적으로 올바른 패치를 거부(불필요한 구현 세부사항·미명시 기능을 강제); (2) 학습 데이터 오염 — 문제가 오픈소스 리포에서 수집돼 프런티어 모델이 정답 커밋을 그대로 재현할 수 있음; (3) 변별력 상실 — 점수 향상이 실제 코딩 능력보다 벤치마크 노출 정도를 반영. OpenAI는 대안으로 SWE-bench Pro 보고를 권장합니다. 출처: https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified/ (이 때문에 최신 모델은 이 컬럼 점수가 비어 있을 수 있음 — 누락이 아니라 의도적 미보고).

name: Tau2 Airline
description: tau2-bench airline domain (Avg@4); evaluated with Claude Opus 4.5 system-card fixes.

name: TAU2-Bench
description: Tool-agent benchmark; airline domain evaluated with Claude Opus 4.5 system-card fixes.

name: Terminal-Bench
description: End-to-end terminal/CLI agent tasks scored by automated checks. Score depends on the agent harness driving the model, so the harness is recorded in the config.

name: Terminal-Bench 2.1
description: End-to-end terminal/CLI agent tasks. Score depends on the agent harness, recorded in config.

name: TextVQA
description: Visual question answering that requires reading text within images.

name: Video-MME
description: Video multimodal evaluation — video understanding/reasoning (reported with subtitles).

name: VisualWebBench
description: Multimodal web-browsing tasks (captioning, QA, OCR, grounding).

name: WildBench
description: 1024 real user prompts, WB-Score / WB-Reward via GPT-4.

name: WildGuard
description: WildGuard content-moderation classification benchmark (reported as F1-score).
